description_long: This factory building features a sprawling, multi-level structure with a combination of flat and slightly elevated roof sections, typical of modern industrial facilities. The exterior is predominantly light gray, with large rectangular windows arranged in rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. Several distinct sections are visible, including a main building block, an attached annex, and a smaller outbuilding, all set on a broad green lot. The front area includes a paved driveway and what appears to be a loading dock, while the rear and side sections have additional paved surfaces and utility installations. Rooftop elements such as vents and mechanical units are visible, indicating the presence of industrial HVAC or other machinery. The overall design is utilitarian, with minimal decorative features, emphasizing function over form.
description: A large, light gray modern industrial factory building with multiple levels, large windows, and rooftop machinery, set on a green lot with paved driveways and loading areas.
description_view_0: From this view, the building's main facade is visible, featuring large windows and a prominent paved driveway leading to the entrance.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the front entrance, a circular pool or tank, and additional rooftop machinery, with the main building massing clearly visible.
description_view_2: The rear of the building is shown, displaying the annex and outbuilding, as well as more industrial features and utility areas.
description_view_3: This side view reveals the length of the building, the annex, and the extended paved area, with fewer windows visible.
